title: Ad Creative Production Square Course Event Poster AI
sourceTitle: Ad Creative Production Square Course Event Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 1:1 square professional advertising poster for promoting a creative AI course or event, built around the headline Ad Creative Production. Subject: Ad Creative Production is the primary readable message, supported by Include the following text verbatim: Ad Creative Production As soon as you think of it, you can play with it. as verbatim poster copy for a book, course, or event promotion. Scene: Professional advertising design environment with clean square layout, strong hierarchy, modern creative-production mood, and polished educational-promo surface. Composition: Square poster with large title area, compact supporting copy blocks, clean visual hierarchy, optional Generate a 1:1 square poster with a professional advertising design aesthetic, suitable for promoting a book, course, or event., and enough whitespace for the text to remain readable. Signature Elements: Preserved ad creative production square course event poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Visual Metaphor: floating browser game window, prompt blocks, cursor trail, and playful creative tools. Style: Professional advertising design aesthetic, crisp typographic poster, creative education campaign, modern AI/browser-game-making theme, book-course-event promo quality, and social-ready finish. Color Palette: Clean high-contrast ad palette with bright creative accents, neutral reading areas, crisp black text, and controlled highlight color for key phrases. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
